headline: Cirebon flood disrupts neighborhood drainage service
summary: Banjir di Cirebon mengganggu layanan drainase lingkungan dan menyebabkan genangan di permukiman padat.
summary_id: Banjir di Cirebon mengganggu layanan drainase lingkungan dan menyebabkan genangan di permukiman padat.
summary_en: Flooding in Cirebon disrupted neighborhood drainage service and caused inundation in dense residential areas.
